3004710.name: NO MORE HUMANS
3004710.description:
NO MORE HUMANS is a top-down single player wave based shooter, where you play as one of the unique survivors slaying and surviving waves of nightmarish enemies. Choose and modify your weapons and defeat fearsome bosses across different environments. Will you survive or die with the world?



The world has been consumed by terrible creatures. Lone survivors must fight and survive waves of enemies, resupplying between waves with new powerful modifiable weapons, grenades and healing syringes.'

  • Fight your way trough waves of varied nightmarish enemies and their more powerful red variants as they attack you with ever increasing wrath
  • Buy unique weapons and modify them to be even more powerful
  • Defeat fearsome bosses that attack every fifth wave
  • Discover and explore new environments, open locked gates and teleports to progress even further
  • Choose one of the unique survivors, difficulty levels and maps to paint red
  • Above all else, survive, because there are NO MORE HUMANS
3004710.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
